title: FrostRealm
body:
![Wolfflue and Floating Islands](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/Ke1NEFHK/images/b64a7b85f956b297161f70b6a9c6319ca4047e92.png)

## Summary
 

"__FrostRealm, a dimension where frozen parts have been purified

…But once it was a barren land

Purification was done by a traveler and his companions, but the purification became a threat and the balance of nature was lost, and the whole world turned wild.

After that, no one knows the faith of the traveler

Frostrealm is a fascinating world of aurora, crystals and mysterious flora.

However, sometimes abnormal weather conditions occur and monsters with special mutations appear..."

 

Strange but interesting plants and creatures
Some Monsters that spawn due to weather abnormalities!
Dangerous Weather!
Unique and different type of Weapon!
 

 

 

## How to get dimension(1.21.1~):

first, you need to find stray warrior in the overworld's cold biome, obtain neckrace part from fight againt spawned stray warrior

seccond, you need to build portal with snow block like nether portal:
